narrative:
Decatur (precinct in Washington County) has 968 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
